summary: Executed backend pytest and frontend Playwright regression for Digital Courtyard expansion on public preview URL. Auth, Home, Courtyards, Timeline, Gatherings, Funds & Travel, Settings, and legacy route regressions all passed.

integration_issues.issue: Checkout session initiation and redirect to Stripe works. End-to-end paid completion/webhook confirmation was not finalized in this run.

action_items: Optional: perform one controlled Stripe sandbox payment completion to validate paid-status/webhook transition end-to-end.
Optional maintainability improvement: split /app/backend/server.py into smaller domain routers/services (>700 lines).
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking code defects found in tested flows.
backend/server.py remains oversized and should be modularized to reduce regression risk.
seed_data_creation: Created new UI/pytest seed entities via real APIs: host courtyard account, subyard, kinship, invite, gathering, travel plan, budget, timeline memory, and story thread.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL tested: https://courtyard-dev.preview.emergentagent.com. Backend pytest: 11/11 passed with expanded Digital Courtyard coverage. Frontend Playwright validated requested flows plus hidden legacy routes (/memories, /threads, /members, /contributions, /events).
rca of the issue: No blocking functional bug reproduced. Non-blocking console request aborts were observed during route changes/third-party redirect transitions (Cloudflare RUM and Stripe preload noise), not impacting user-visible flows.
